topic: Shop insurance renewal with State Farm
agenda: Shop insurance renewal with State Farm.
Tyler's 25th birthday. Family dinner at the Ysleta house.

topic: Shop insurance renewal with State Farm
agenda: Shop insurance renewal with State Farm. Confirm coverage levels before the payment posts.
Amy's 22nd birthday. Family dinner at home; Beth handling cake.
Thanksgiving. Hosting at the Ysleta house. Tyler and his girlfriend Sarah confirmed; Dorothy at the head of the table.
Dorothy's 75th birthday. Family lunch at home; Beth baking her favourite sugar-free carrot cake.

topic: Amy's college graduation from El Paso Technical University
agenda: Amy's college graduation from El Paso Technical University. Saturday ceremony; Beth coordinating the lunch after.
Christmas Eve service at First Baptist Church, 6:00 PM. Family gathering at home after.
Christmas Day family dinner. Tyler on PTO if his shifts allow.
New Year's Day open house. Brisket on the smoker; Cowboys on the TV with the neighbors and shop crew.
James's 51st birthday. Quiet family dinner. He has said no fuss.
Quarterly estimated tax payment (personal and business). Robert (CPA) confirms figures the week before.

topic: SBA microloan decision expected from Desert Plains Federal Credit Union
agenda: SBA microloan decision expected from Desert Plains Federal Credit Union; scanner and alignment-rack orders queued pending approval.

topic: Super Bowl LXI and Valentine's Day fall on the same Sunday
agenda: Super Bowl LXI and Valentine's Day fall on the same Sunday. Watch party at Eddie's during the game; reservation for Beth at Cattleman's Steakhouse after.
Beth and James's 23rd wedding anniversary. Long weekend planned somewhere on the Gulf if the shop coverage holds.
Beth's 49th birthday. Reservation at Cattleman's Steakhouse; Amy hosting cake at home after.
Tyler's 26th birthday. Family dinner at home.

topic: Shop insurance renewal with State Farm
agenda: Shop insurance renewal with State Farm.
